title: lachnostylis hirta var. minor
intro: Lachnostylis hirta var. minor is a plant species, commonly known as the dwarf green plum or lesser green plum, that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It is native to Western Australia and has been used by the local Aboriginal people for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Lachnostylis hirta var. minor can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its health benefits.
